text.title: Rust Tokio Async Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the service use Tokio 1.x with concurrent network I/O?

branch.question: Any blocking calls on async paths?

conclusion.verdict: switch to bounded channel with capacity
ensure timeout on every network await

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
